sections.paragraph:
Original: חלדּה

Transliteration: chûldâh

Phonetic: khool-daw'

BDB Definition:

Huldah = "weasel"
  1. a prophetess in the time of Josiah whom Josiah asked for an authoritative opinion on the book of the law which Hilkiah found

Origin: from H2467

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
